headline: AI for Logistics: Last-Mile Delivery, Fleet Routing, and Warehouse Automation
description: AI powers the invisible logistics backbone behind every online order -- predicting what customers will order before they click, routing millions of packages through warehouse robots, and optimizing delivery routes in real-time. From Amazon's fulfillment centers to UPS's 10M-gallon fuel savings, AI logistics delivers the physical outcomes of digital intelligence.

citation.name: Artificial Intelligence in Supply Chain Optimization: A Comprehensive Systematic Review of 199 Articles
AI-driven optimization of vehicle routing problems in supply chain logistics
